text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I decide to check out a sale that caught
my attention.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
DAMMIT! I wasn't expectin' the competition to be
this fierce...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Money's tight, and I can't afford to lose out on
these deals. B-but this...
choice_data_list: Looks like a war zone here.
Looks like a war zone here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's just you. Didn't expect to see ya—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, I'm not backin' down! This Umamusume isn't
goin' home till she's got the goods!
choice_data_list: Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!
Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Grrr, I'm not backin' down! This Umamusume isn't
goin' home till she's got the goods!
choice_data_list: Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!
Get a grasp on the crowd's movements!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right! I gotta watch 'em just like in my
races...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now's my chance! I'mma flank 'em from the inside
and attack 'em real good!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Take dat! Outta my way! I'll show ya what an
Osaka shopper's really like!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I thought I was gonna get crushed in there!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But how's that for speed?! I left about fifteen other shoppers in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya better believe it! C'mon, lemme me hear ya
say it again! Three cheers for White Lightning!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's one way to approach it. Time to
take a step back from the front line!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The enemy knows my movements, so they'll just
send me flyin' if I try to dive in from the front.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I gotta be extra cautious with that older lady in
the tiger stripes. That's Iron Wall Michiyo, and
she's trouble.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She shuts out all her rivals' paths so no one can
get through... All the regulars know her.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna avoid Michiyo and get to what I want...
Then I've gotta go this way!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A'ight, I'm gonna dive in! Watch and learn,
rookie!
